description: Dutch digital mental health platform offering online therapy modules, self-help tools, and blended care solutions. Used by mental health institutions, employers, and insurers across Europe.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to mental health providers, insurers, and employers
target_market: European healthcare organizations, insurers, and employers
competitive_advantage: Evidence-based modules, long track record, European focus, GDPR compliance

varden_fit.rationale: Strong mental health content platform - could power Varden's mental health offering
